tasks.title: Stabilize build_daily_plan RPC
tasks.description: The build_daily_plan RPC has been rewritten 4+ times and remains unstable. Audit the Postgres function definition (in migrations), identify failure modes, and produce a stable version with proper error handling and fallback logic.
tasks.notes: RPC defined as Postgres function in migrations. Frontend hook calls supabase.rpc('build_daily_plan'). Instability is in the SQL, not the frontend.

tasks.title: Complete V4 question pipeline migration
tasks.description: All 6 core Edge Functions exist but V4 pipeline may be incomplete. Audit each for V4 schema compatibility and ensure end-to-end flow works.
tasks.notes: 13 Edge Functions exist total. Gemini AI via REST.

tasks.title: Set up FSRS maintenance cron (pg_cron + pg_net)
tasks.description: Configure pg_cron to run the daily-fsrs-maintenance Edge Function. Function and hook both exist but need cron trigger.
tasks.notes: Edge Function and hook already exist. Need pg_cron migration.

tasks.title: Add Vitest suite for FSRS calculations
tasks.description: Write comprehensive tests for src/lib/fsrs.ts and src/lib/fsrs-stats.ts: card creation, scheduling, state transitions, dbRowToCard/cardToDbRow conversions, edge cases.
tasks.notes: Vitest configured. 6 existing test files in src/test/. ts-fsrs installed.

tasks.title: Add tests for question scoring/dedup logic
tasks.description: Write Vitest tests for question type classification, exam utilities, and scoring formulas.
tasks.notes: Cover scoring formula, dedup detection, quality thresholds.

tasks.title: Fix hardcoded Supabase credentials (Lovable workaround)
tasks.description: src/lib/supabase.ts has hardcoded Supabase URL and key. This file is imported by 40 files. Migrate to use env vars. Remove hardcoded credentials from source.
tasks.notes: SECURITY: Hardcoded credentials in src/lib/supabase.ts used by 40 files. src/integrations/supabase/client.ts uses env vars but only 1 import. src/lib/supabaseClient.ts uses getPublicEnv() but 0 imports. .env.example already exists.

tasks.description: Create GitHub Actions workflow: npm ci, eslint, vitest. Configure as required status check.
tasks.notes: No .github directory. Scripts 'lint' and 'test' defined in package.json.
